connection_params.name: forge_hub_endpoint
connection_params.description: Forge hub gRPC endpoint the spoke registers with and exchanges data through (e.g. grpc://localhost:50051).

connection_params.name: plc_path
connection_params.description: Rockwell Logix EtherNet/IP path 'ip[/slot]' (e.g. 192.168.1.10/1), addressed via pycomm3. Leave empty to operate purely hub-mediated.

connection_params.name: control_period_s
connection_params.description: MPC control period in seconds (how often the controller computes a move).

connection_params.name: rearm_holdoff_s
connection_params.description: Seconds the PLC link must be continuously healthy before the supervisor (re)arms and takes the loop (anti-flap / auto-revert hold-off).

connection_params.name: heartbeat_timeout_s
connection_params.description: The PLC heartbeat must advance within this many seconds or the link is considered unhealthy.

connection_params.name: sp_min
connection_params.description: Soft lower clamp on the written setpoint (the PLC enforces the hard clamp).

connection_params.name: sp_max
connection_params.description: Soft upper clamp on the written setpoint (the PLC enforces the hard clamp).

connection_params.name: dry_run
connection_params.description: If true, read and solve but never write (commissioning mode). Defaults to true for safety.

connection_params.name: verify_ssl
connection_params.description: Verify TLS/SSL certificates for the hub connection.
